text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D, Version 2 │ May 2026 │ V 1.2 
61 
VALID_DEATH_DT_SW 
LABEL: 
Valid Date of Death Switch 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary’s day of death has been verified by the Social Security 
Administration (SSA) or the Railroad Retirement Board (RRB). 
LONG NAME: VALID_DEATH_DT_SW 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 
VALUES: 
Null = Default 
V =
